creator: michael.hmich@gmail.com
text:
I haven't just repelled setting boot_verbose=1, I tried it before and did it again to not giving any wrong answer, it didn't come anything else about the partitions as we saw already

devinfo I also tried before using as you said it shows just trivial system hardware info, nothing particular about the disks

devinfo -p /dev/ada0 -v should give better info but returns
devinfo: /dev/ada0: Not found
or 
devinfo -p ada0
devinfo: ada0: Not found

about fstab and ext2fs
it doesn't matter what options I set, ro,w,rw, async ... nothing works, any possible combination I tried before reporting the problem

so far the only possible way to mount ext2fs is from cmd, then mount options, like ro,rw,async etc are accepted

I send you the dump, probably only monday morning

thanks
